identity.name: ECOSTRESS nonphotosyntheticvegetation tir axis 1389b1f1

top_classes.name: Samples were collected as part of the HyspIRI Airborne Campaign. 48 individual plants were sampled in three times in 2013 - spring summer and fall. The name of the sample includes a 1 2 or 3 which references a different individual of the species. Samples were taken to JPL and processed within 48 hours of collection. The same leaves were processed in the Nicolet and then measured using the ASD.
Meerdink et al. 2019, Baldridge et al. 2009
